events.text:
The scenario describes rebar placement that is rough-complete, with the checkpoint scope finished for the area. Remaining work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside the checkpoint. No defects are described. Reference materials are on hand (ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings). The photos show the current checkpoint scope finished.

This seems like a pass scenario - the work is rough-complete, no defects mentioned, remaining work is outside the checkpoint scope.
